description_long: This house features a modern, single-story layout with a flat roof and a clean, geometric footprint. The exterior walls are primarily white with large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a living area, all visible through the open-plan design. There are several green plants and minimalistic furnishings, contributing to a contemporary and inviting atmosphere. The house includes multiple entry points, with the main entrance marked by a larger glass door and adjacent windows. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection to the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a clean, geometric design. The layout features multiple rooms and a contemporary, open-plan interior.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main facade with large glass doors and windows, highlighting the open-plan living area and entryway.
description_view_1: View 1 reveals the side and rear of the house, displaying additional windows and access points, as well as the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the opposite side, emphasizing the flat roof, more windows, and the overall rectangular footprint.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back and another side of the house, showing a secondary entrance and a partially enclosed outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door with adjacent windows, minimal steps, and a clean, modern aesthetic without decorative columns or overhangs.
